1073.issue: [W1073] Potential sensitive data "activeToken" not listed at "protectedNative" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/io-package.json)

1074.issue: [W1074] Potential sensitive data "activeToken" not listed at "encryptedNative" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/io-package.json)

3025.issue: [E3025] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 20. Tests with node.js 20 are required.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/io-package.json).

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#318] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/issues/318)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.solarmanpv/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
